content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be reengineered to prioritize the retention of high-uncertainty, curiosity-triggered experiences, rather than storing all encountered trajectories equally. This creates a self-reinforcing loop where the agent’s curiosity-driven exploration continuously improves the quality of its memory, which in turn guides more targeted active learning sampling.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
